_comment: Curated baseline of custom-node packages that recur across migrated workflows on this fleet. node-precheck.mts checks these are present on a target and (with --prepare) installs missing ones. Grows over time — add a package here once a workflow needed it, so new nodes are prepared once instead of tripping repeatedly. dir = the custom_nodes/ directory name; repo = git url to clone.

custom_nodes.provides: Fast Groups Bypasser, Power Lora Loader, Image Comparer
CR Text and other Comfyroll utility nodes
extra samplers (res_2s, res_2m, …) + schedulers (bong_tangent, …) injected into KSampler
